tasks.title: Scaffold project
tasks.description: Scaffold project: pyproject.toml (Python 3.11+), package src/keycloak_mcp/, tests/, deps (fastmcp, httpx, jsonschema, pydantic-settings, pytest, pytest-asyncio, respx).
tasks.details: Where: pyproject.toml, src/keycloak_mcp/, tests/. Done when: uv sync / pip install -e . succeeds, pytest runs (0 tests, no errors).

tasks.title: Vendor Keycloak OpenAPI spec
tasks.description: Vendor spec/keycloak-openapi.json — fetch official spec once, commit.
tasks.details: Where: spec/keycloak-openapi.json. Done when: file exists, valid JSON, openapi field present.

tasks.title: Spec sync script
tasks.description: scripts/sync_openapi.py — fetch URL, overwrite vendored spec (FR-9).
tasks.details: Where: scripts/sync_openapi.py. Done when: python scripts/sync_openapi.py --dry-run diffs without writing; real run updates file.

tasks.title: Settings config
tasks.description: config.py: Settings (pydantic-settings) — KEYCLOAK_BASE_URL, AUTH_METHOD, conditional fields per FR-4/Specs §5. Validate conditional-required fields at load (FR-4).
tasks.testStrategy: Missing CLIENT_SECRET under client_credentials raises; valid password-mode config loads.

tasks.title: OpenAPI models
tasks.description: openapi/models.py: Operation, Param, dataclasses per Design §1.
tasks.details: Where: src/keycloak_mcp/openapi/models.py. Done when: importable, no logic yet.

tasks.title: OpenAPI parser
tasks.description: openapi/parser.py: parse spec -> list[Operation] (FR-1). Implement IR-3 synthesized operationId + warning log.
tasks.testStrategy: Fixture spec with named + unnamed operationId; malformed operation doesn't crash parse.

tasks.title: AuthManager protocol
tasks.description: auth/manager.py — AuthManager Protocol.

tasks.title: Client credentials auth
tasks.description: auth/client_credentials.py — client_credentials grant token fetch.
tasks.testStrategy: Mocked token endpoint (respx) -> token returned; no refresh logic present (assert absence).

tasks.title: Password (ROPC) auth
tasks.description: auth/password.py — ROPC grant token fetch.

tasks.title: HTTP client wrapper
tasks.description: http/client.py — async httpx wrapper, builds request from Operation + resolved params, no retry (IR-2).
tasks.testStrategy: Network exception propagates unmodified (no retry attempted — assert call count == 1).

tasks.title: KeycloakApiError
tasks.description: errors.py — KeycloakApiError(status, body), raised on non-2xx, no per-status branching (FR-7/IR-5).
tasks.testStrategy: 403 and 500 both produce raw passthrough, no message rewriting.

tasks.title: Input validator
tasks.description: validation/validator.py — jsonschema validation of tool input against operation schema (FR-6).
tasks.testStrategy: Invalid input rejected pre-request (assert HTTP client never called).

tasks.title: Tool generator
tasks.description: tools/generator.py — build one FastMCP tool per Operation: name, input schema, handler (validate -> auth -> http -> error-wrap). Try/except isolation per operation (Design §3).
tasks.testStrategy: Fixture spec (5-10 ops incl. one malformed) -> correct tool count generated, malformed op skipped+logged, generation_report accurate.

tasks.title: Realm param handling
tasks.description: Realm param handling — realm required/optional derived from operation path/params (FR-5), DEFAULT_REALM fallback when optional and omitted.
tasks.testStrategy: Operation with required realm rejects missing realm; optional realm falls back to DEFAULT_REALM.

tasks.title: FastMCP server bootstrap
tasks.description: server.py — FastMCP app: load settings, parse spec once, generate+register tools, start stdio transport.
tasks.testStrategy: Startup with fixture spec registers expected tool count; startup time assertion against NFR-1 (<2s) using real vendored spec.

tasks.title: Structured JSON logging
tasks.description: Structured JSON logging (FR-8) — method/path/status only, explicit test that body/token never appear in log output.
tasks.testStrategy: Log capture assert no PII/secret substrings present across a sample of calls.

tasks.title: uvx entry point
tasks.description: uvx entry point (IR-6) — [project.scripts] in pyproject.toml.
tasks.details: Where: pyproject.toml. Done when: uvx --from . keycloak-mcp-server boots server.

tasks.title: README docs
tasks.description: README: config vars, .env warning (IR-4 — never commit secrets), auth method setup, sync script usage.

tasks.title: Coverage check
tasks.description: Full coverage check against NFR-2 (>80% generator + auth manager) — pytest --cov=keycloak_mcp.tools.generator --cov=keycloak_mcp.auth.

tasks.title: End-to-end smoke test
tasks.description: End-to-end smoke: run server against a local/dev Keycloak instance (if available), invoke 2-3 real tools (list realms, create/delete test user), confirm error passthrough on a deliberate 403.
tasks.details: Manual smoke test against real/dev Keycloak.

tasks.title: Operation/Param model fields
tasks.description: Add summary/description to Operation, description to Param in openapi/models.py.
tasks.details: Where: src/keycloak_mcp/openapi/models.py. Done when: module imports, existing construction call sites still work (optional fields).

tasks.title: Parser reads operation summary/description
tasks.description: _parse_operation reads raw_operation.get('summary')/.get('description') into Operation (FR-2).
tasks.testStrategy: Fixture operation with both fields -> Operation.summary/.description populated; fixture operation with neither -> both None.

tasks.title: Parser reads param description
tasks.description: _parse_params reads raw_param.get('description') into Param (FR-2).
tasks.testStrategy: Fixture param with description -> populated; without -> None.

tasks.title: Validator merges param description into schema
tasks.description: build_input_schema() merges param.description into properties[param.name]['description'], skip if schema already has description (FR-4).
tasks.testStrategy: Param with description + no existing schema description -> merged in; schema already has description from resolve_refs -> untouched.

tasks.title: Generator builds combined tool description
tasks.description: generate_tools() computes tool_description = operation.description or operation.summary or None, concatenating f'{summary}\n\n{description}' when both present; pass description=tool_description to GeneratedTool(...) (FR-3).
tasks.testStrategy: Operation with summary only -> description = summary; description only -> description = description; both -> concatenated; neither -> None.

tasks.title: Full suite regression check
tasks.description: Run full pytest suite, confirm no regressions (NFR-1).

tasks.title: Manual check against real spec
tasks.description: Parse spec/keycloak-openapi.json, pick 2-3 operations known to carry summary/description (users/clients routes), confirm Operation fields populate and generate_tools() output has non-None description.

tasks.title: Optional: boot MCP server and inspect tools/list
tasks.description: Boot MCP server locally, list tools via client/inspector, confirm description shows in tools/list response (Specs §5.4).

tasks.title: Extract path-item-level parameters in parse_spec
tasks.description: openapi/parser.py::parse_spec: extract path_item.get("parameters", []) per path, path_item pair, pass as new path_level_params arg into _parse_operation (FR-1).
tasks.details: Where: src/keycloak_mcp/openapi/parser.py::parse_spec. Done when: path_level_params extracted once per path and threaded into every _parse_operation call for that path.

tasks.title: Merge path-level and operation-level params in _parse_operation
tasks.description: openapi/parser.py::_parse_operation: accept path_level_params: list[dict]; merge with raw_operation.get("parameters", []) keyed by (name, in), operation-level wins on collision; pass merged list to _parse_params (FR-2).
tasks.details: Where: src/keycloak_mcp/openapi/parser.py::_parse_operation. Done when: merged param list passed to _parse_params. Gate: pytest tests/test_parser.py
tasks.testStrategy: Path item with shared parameters + get with no operation-level params -> merged Operation.params contains shared param, required=True; path item with shared param + operation declaring same (name, in) differently -> operation-level wins; path item with no shared parameters -> behavior unchanged (NFR-3).

tasks.title: Full test suite regression check
tasks.description: Run full pytest suite, confirm no regressions (NFR-1).
tasks.details: Where: repo root. Done when: pytest exits 0.

tasks.title: Parse real spec and assert realm param present
tasks.description: Parse real spec, assert get_admin_realms_realm operation (from spec/keycloak-openapi.json) now has realm in Operation.params, required=True.
tasks.details: Where: spec/keycloak-openapi.json via parse_spec. Done when: assertion passes.

tasks.title: Manual MCP tool invocation check
tasks.description: Invoke mcp__keycloak__get_admin_realms_realm with {"realm": "lingopass"} -> returns realm data; omit realm -> clean InputValidationError, not bare KeyError.
tasks.details: Where: manual MCP tool call. Done when: both cases confirmed.
